caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" and a green cap, along with headphones. The setting appears to be a casual studio environment, decorated with numerous framed photographs on the wall behind him, which seem to capture various moments and people. To his right, there is a mannequin dressed in a white shirt and a rack of clothes, suggesting that the location might also serve as a clothing store or boutique. The man speaks into the microphone, occasionally looking off to the side, indicating he might be engaged in conversation with someone off-camera. The overall atmosphere is relaxed and informal, typical of a podcast recording session.
